name: DiagnosisCode
title: Diagnosis Code
description: List of available codes are accessible using valueset 'aria-diagnosiscode'. All values can be accessed using ValueSet $expand operation i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code. Codes can be filtered on schemas using context filter i.e. /fhir/ValueSet/$expand?url=http://varian.com/fhir/ValueSet/condition-code&context=http://hl7.org/fhir/sid/icd-9-cm|icd-9-cm
